name: majia-guanyuan
displayName: 观远 BI · 马甲实战版
description: Tool-agnostic Claude Code / OpenClaw / Codex / Hermes skill for Guandata BI (观远 BI). Five capabilities: data query & card creation (Part A), ETL governance & write (Part B, incl. SmartETL full-chain rewrite & ExecPlan), custom chart HTML/JS injection & debugging (Part C-1..11), HTML application-style dashboard generation (Part C-12, SDK subtype + DATA_GRID dataView layer + descriptor-level selector linkage patch), and V7 Page/Card publish pipeline (Part D: v7 draft/release mechanism + guanvis-skill one-shot publish + 3-state CSV rules + Spark CTE Chinese-alias gotcha + ETL update output dsId injection + 6-dashboard end-to-end case study + SmartETL node-level COUNT_DISTINCT/JOIN-multi-predicate/FULL_OUTER silent traps + HTML customChart autoBootstrap + chip toolbar fallback + mobile phoneLayout ZIP-inject path). V2.1.10 (2026-05-21) extends Part D with `references/v7-page-card-publish-pipeline.md` §16 (~330 lines) — mobile phoneLayout complete guide distilled from porting 9 demo dashboards to mobile: v7 BI has NO callable draft save REST API (8 candidate endpoints all stub/404, BI editor saves via non-REST channel — WebSocket / Redux internal); the ONLY working path is `guanvis-skill pack` → Python inject phoneLayout into `page.meta` (must be JSON string not object, else `error.expected.jsstring`) → `guanvis-skill upload` via transfer API directly overwrites the published page; phoneLayout five-field structure (layoutSetting with mobileHeightUnit:60 + layout with `i/w/h/x/y/minW/isDraggable` + layoutItemMap with `group_AUTO_PHONE` selector container + tabMap + mobileAnchorCds); customChart h=40 ≈ 572px fits 4 KPI + 4 charts; CSS @media 768px breakpoint (KPI 4→2 col, fonts shrink, chip auto-wrap, `html,body { height:auto }` to unlock iOS scroll, `#dash-root` with `-webkit-overflow-scrolling: touch` for momentum scrolling). V2.1.9: HTML customChart `renderChart` race condition + `autoBootstrap` 5s fallback + 7 server-side filter formats all rejected + `PAGE_DATA_SDK.initPage()` stuck on pgId + chip toolbar JS-side filter pattern. V2.1.8: SmartETL node-level GROUP_BY STRING COUNT_DISTINCT silently swapped to NUL aggrType + JOIN_DATA only honors predicates[0] producing Cartesian explosion + FULL_OUTER silently downgraded to INNER + two-layer GROUP_BY workaround. V2.1.7: routing/triggering refresh — frontmatter description extended to cover Part D + restaurant-BI-formulas trigger keywords. Battle-tested with 60+ ETL operations, 41-card production HTML application dashboard, a 20-table + 17-ETL + 6-HTML-dashboard end-to-end demo, and a 9-dashboard mobile adaptation. V2.1.5 introduces references/restaurant-bi-formulas/ — fully-anonymized restaurant-chain BI formula playbook (10 markdown files, 2881 lines, 60+ SQL snippets + 6 ETL engineering patterns + 39 production ETL catalog index). Progressive disclosure keeps SKILL.md as the router and references/ + templates/ + scripts/ as detailed playbooks. Install via `gh skill`, `git clone` + `node bin/install.js install`, `npx github:maojiebc/majia-guanyuan install`, or ClawHub/OpenClaw.
author: maojiebc

triggers._note: Legacy field kept for backward compatibility. The single source of truth for triggering is SKILL.md frontmatter `description`. All known target agents (Claude Code, OpenClaw, Codex, Hermes) read description, not manifest.triggers — keeping these in sync was overhead. Refresh from SKILL.md description if you intend to consume them.
